entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region in Asia experiencing gains in food production and food security but facing resource degradation

entities.name: WEST ASIA
entities.description: A region in Asia where agriculture is a dominant economic activity

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing food, which has seen impressive gains in South Asia

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: RURAL POVERTY
entities.description: Economic hardship in rural areas, which has been reduced in South Asia

entities.name: DEGRADATION OF NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: The decline in the quality of natural resources, persisting as a problem in South Asia

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources, persisting as a problem in South Asia

entities.name: LOW PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: Low output per unit of input in agriculture, persisting as a problem in South Asia

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The science or practice of farming, the dominant economic activity in South and West Asia

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS OF THE POOR
entities.description: The means of securing basic necessities for impoverished people, facing threats of marginalization

entities.name: DEMAND-DRIVEN RESEARCH AGENDA
entities.description: A research plan based on the actual needs and demands of stakeholders

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY APPROACH
entities.description: A method involving all stakeholders in the decision-making process to establish research agendas

entities.name: GAP ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to identify the difference between current performance and desired performance to set research priorities

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A South Asian country that presented research needs and gaps

entities.description: A South Asian country that presented research needs and gaps

entities.description: A South Asian country that presented research needs and gaps

entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: A South Asian country that presented research needs and gaps

entities.name: IRAN
entities.description: A West Asian country that presented research needs and gaps

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: A broad theme of agricultural research priority focusing on improving crop genetics

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A broad theme of agricultural research priority focusing on the sustainable use of resources

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC AND POLICY RESEARCH
entities.description: A broad theme of agricultural research priority focusing on social, economic, and policy factors
